segments.text: Today we have come here to do Hanumanas Puja.
Shri Hanumana is a great character in our being
and he runs all the way from Swadhisthana
through your brain,
And He supplies
All necessary guidance
We need
In out futuristic planning
or
Our mental activities
He gives us guidance and protection.
As you know that Germany is a place where people are very active,
Very right sided use their brain too much
And they're machine oriented also
It's surprising how a deity like Shri Anumana
Who was an eternal child
because he was like a monkey, his head
that of the monkey if not an elephant.
So He's been eternal child and
He is one who has used
to run on right side human beings
You are told you must control sun
begin with, He have to control Sun
That the sun in people
If there too much sun then
He must try to control it and make it cooler or smoother.
So he was a child after all, so as soon…
…he was born very new that you have look out for the sun
– why not eat off?
So he ran up the Virata's body and ate of this Surya.
There I had to be told,
no-no you have control him
don't put it inside your stomach
because He thought that
This sun will
be controlled better if has in his own stomach
so The beauty
Of His character is
That He Is a child
And the child-like behavior of Shri Hanumana has to control
The right side, if there's a right sided mother or
A Right Sided father.
Normally right sited people don't get children
They are over right sided
Then even they got children but
Really not liked by their children
Because have no time for children
All that time are very strict with
Their children and shout at them
they don't know how to handle the children, or they are overindulgent because
They always think that I never got this so let me give it
To The Child. So these extreme type of people who
Are right sided have Got This Harmana
Who is nothing but a child he Is very anxious
Very Anxious to do the work Of Shri Rama
Now, Shri Rama is a character I would say which is full of balance absolutely.
He's the benevolent king we Socrates has described so he needed somebody with him all
time to do the work or supply him, help him – like a secretary you can call Him.
And Shri Hanuman was created for this purpose because Shri Rama such an assistant… I mean
have that much of dedication for their master, you can say like a dog or horse but also doesn't
happen.
Such dedicated for Shri Rama by the time He grew up he got now nine siddhis, Navadha
Siddhi's – 9 siddhis he got!
These saddhis are so big and so heavy nobody could lift Him.
He could become so sukshwana that nobody would see Him.
It will be come subtle, but no one can see him
There are nine siddhis that he got
So a person who has got the right side too much in here
He controls with these nine siddhi
Now how we control a man
Who is running very fast
In his life
What he does is to control his movement.
He makes him in such a way that
has put down His speed,
it's make His feet very heavy
now you can't do that much
or
You may see His hands are really heavy
so the person cannot work very
much with these hands
So we can give
a tremendous kind of a lethargic heaviness
to the person who is
very right sided.
He has got another siddhis,
which are really interesting
that he can extend his
–he doesn't have many weapons
and only one gada in His hand
and he can extend his tail to any extent
And, He can handle people with His tails.
It does not have use of His hand
Sitting down here
You put the tail around anywhere
If you want
Just make a mountain off its tail
Sit on that
Like all these monkey tricks as we call them
And all these things he has within himself is to control a person who
extremely right sided, to begin with. Then He can fly in the air
just uh..he doesn't have any wings but
you Can Just Fly In The Air
that means You Can become so big
that the amount of air he displaces has a much more weight than his own weight, just
same principle Archimedes if you know the Archimedes' principle. That He becomes
so big ,that His body starts floating in there like boat you see and He can fly
the air, and by flying in the air he can carry the message from one to another through
ether. Now this subtle of the ether that we have is under command of Shri Hanuman. He
He is the one who controls or is in-the Lord of this ether,
The subtle of either.
Or say that causal of the ether and through it communicates
All these communications you find like
we have within ourselves also ductless glands
which a pituitary
Is using duct less glands
It's true Hanumanas movement
Because he can go into an iraqar
He can go into a formless state.
Also the communications we have, for this communication that
We may be able to say they've got a loudspeaker but
They also have television and radios and all those things
Where you catch on with ether anything is
All the blessings of Hanumana
And are available to people who
Are right sided
Only the right-sided people discover these things of this space, which we call as a cordless
telephone or thing without.
We have also telegraphs and where you don't use any wires so with out any connection through
ether he can manage, so all the ethereal connections has been done by this great engineer Shri
Hanumana.
And it is perfect that you cannot challenge and find faults with him – maybe your instruments
may not be alright but as far his ethereal work is concerned He's perfectly there
Now the scientists discover it and think that
It is in nature, but they never think.
How can be?
We say something on ether
And how does it receive from other end
They just take for granted
That we are saying here
Or relaying something
On television
And you see another side
But they don't even think or
Search out
how it is done, what's the way and this work of Shri Hanumana who has done such a beautiful
network. And through that network all these things workout so even on right side the
vibrations we get in molecules as you know that we get molecules like sulphur dioxide
If you have the sulphur, has two oxygen and the oxygen goes on pulsating like that.
They are isometric-symmetric type of vibrations –
You all must be knowing about it!
So these things symmetric and isymmetric vibrations
Are created by whom? Nobody wants to know
nobody want's find out because afterall in an atom or an
so imagine a molecule
That deep who does this job
Is done By Shri Hanuman
In his subtle ways
So he has another great, great siddhi which we call as anima.
Anima – anu means a molecule and that means it can enter into a molecule or renu is the atom
It's going to be entered in molecules or into atoms
Now many scientists think they are… in modern times they discovered the molecules
It's not so, because it is already in our oldest scriptures description of anima – is
there.
Is of anu-renu–is there!
So he has described that now then wherever you see the electromagnetic forces working
it is worked through Hanumana's blessings.
He Is the one who creates electromagnetic forces,
so now we can see that as Ganesha
has got a magnetic force in him – he' s the magnet
…he Has Got The Magnetic Force
then We Can Say The Electromagnetic
is the one which we call as Hanuman as a force,
on material side of it.
But from matter he goes up to brain
so He rises
from Swadhisthana
Upto The Brain
So in the brain also
He creates the co-relationships of different sides
Of our brain.
So how much he gives us, I mean we can say
If Ganesha give'sus this wisdom
Then HE giv'SuS the power to think
He protects us also that
We should not thing about bad things
That is
We can say that, that if Kanisha gives us the wisdom
then Shri Hanumana gives us the conscience.
I hope you understand difference between them two
Wisdom is where
You do not need conscious so much
because your wise know what's good and bad
but Consciousness needed in a personality
Where He used to be controlled
And that control comes from Shri Hanumana, which is the Conscience in a human being.
Now this Consciousness of Shri Hanuman is the subtle form
Which gives us, it's in Sanskrit called as Sat Viveka Buddhi
means Sat means truth, Asat means untruth
Truth and Viveka means the discrimination,
And Buddhi is intelligence.
So intelligence to discriminate between
The truth or untruth
Is given us by Shri Hanumala
In the Sahaja Yoga system
If we say that Ganesha is the one who gives us
He's the Adhyaksha, means he is – I call him as the Chancellor of the university.
He is one who goes on degree to us now you have crossed this chakra that chakra and
he helps use know what state we are in so Ganesa gives say Nirvichara Samadhi which
We can call it as the thoughtless awareness and Nirvikalpa Samadhi.
He gives all that, also he give us joy but
The understanding
That this is good
This for our benevolence
Mental understand comes to use from Shri Hanuman
And its very important
For western people
because it has to be mental, otherwise they won't understand.
If is not a mental thing then cannot come into abstract
– It's have been meant and so the mental understanding
of whether its good or bad
Is given us by Shri Hanuman
Without him even if you become saint
You will enjoy the saintliness
But whether this saintliness is alright if you live on Himalayas or it's all right when
your go across to people,to give them realization.
All these canning – this Viveka Buddhi ,all the scanning and discrimination .All
this guidance, all these protection is given to us by Shri Hanumara.
Germany being a country which has very-very much I should say an essence of right side
and because it's been such an essence on the Right Side its important that we get
protector of right side, here worshipped. But in all that Viveka Buddhi
–in the discrimination he knows one thing-
That He is absolutely subservient to Shri Rama
Now what's Shri Rama? Shri Rama
Is a benevolent King
and works for the benevolence
And Shri Rama himself
He's a formal, formal king like Sankocha we call it – I mean English words are not
so good to explain but Shri Rama is the one who will not push forward himself.
It keeps back his very balanced and poised person
So Hanumana you see he…he Is always anxious to do the work of Shri Rama
Always.
Shri Rama says, all right you go and get the Sanjeevani is kind of a herb that was needed
to bring Lakshmana into life – he went there brought whole mountain with him now it's
better have this like sort-of person see so He brought …that childlike behavior
And the discrimination in this is that, that if Shri Rama has asked for whatever he asks
I'll do it. So its a relationship of like a guru and shishya but even more than
that the Shishya is just like a subservient servant, absolutely surrendered to God.
Absolutely surrendered to God and his main theme in surrender
Now see this surrender itself shows
That all those who are right sided people
Are surrendered
To god
Not surrendered
to their bosses. Mostly all those right-sided people are very surrendered
– they're bosses, surrender to the jobs sometimes surrender
for wives also but there are subservient
wrong people have no discretion you'll always find that
They've got no discretion
But if You take help of Anuvana then He tells
That's your duty to be surrendered to God Almighty and not
anybody else or to your guru like Rama, otherwise you are not to be surrendered
too. Anybody Else and then You're a free bird
And we have all the nine powers within yourself.
Hanumanas whole thing is to antidote
Your over activity
To antidote Your
Too much thinking
to antidote your ego.
Now, how he finishes the ego of people
is very sweetly shown when
He burnt... The whole of Lanka
Is a capital
Of Ravana
and they way He made fun off him
because you see anybody who's egoistical
one must make fun on them then it all right
Like first he went and when Ravana saw him,
He said who are you? The monkey.
So just pushed his tail towards Him
And tickled His nose with its tail
.He is the one that makes fun of egotistical people
Now if somebody egoistical tries to trouble You
,he's the One
will make such a Fun out Of Him
That we'll be amazed how this fellow was jumping
like a Humpty Dumpty has fallen down and broken his crown.
So, see it is the job of Hanumana
to protect you from egoistical people
And also he protects the Egoistical People
by showing them down
Like say Saddam
In case of saddam I just asked hanumana
To do that job because i know He will
Now how have put this Saddam
into different circumstances
that he doesn't know what to do,
He does not how go because supposing
he says all right I'll have a war
so the whole of Iraq will be finished.
It would finish, Kuwait it'd be finished
or petrol we've been finished alright
everybody is in trouble
but about him?
He won' t there too
Because if Americans had fight
they are going his place and fight
They don''t fighting America
Is now went into America to fight them
Few Americans may dead
So now, in this Sadam's brain also Hanumana is working and telling him – Now see, mister
if you do like these then it will happen.
He works into the brains of all politicians ,all his egoistic people . Then they get
sometimes stunned or change their policies come round that how they manage.
Also, another great quality of Hanumanai is that he makes people sort-of an arbitrator
his.
He make's peopIe meet each other and two egoistic peopIes –he wiII meaIk them
meet–and then he'II create such situation that they both become friends
and become mild. So, His whole character within us acts as to see our ego, discriminate that
oh this is my ego which working –and then it becomes child-like
And sweet, mirthful & happy
He's always in a dancing mood
All the time he's dancing
And before Rama, He's always bowed down and
Always wants to do whatever is the desire of Shri Ram.
So if Ganesha stands behind Me,
Hanumana stands here at My feet
& he' s there in same way I would say
If Germany has asked me
that if Germany can become like Hanuman
Then what a dynamic force we have, if they become so subservient.
And the subservient nature of Harumana is seen to such an extent that
as you know story about Sita when she gave necklace
and he wouldn't wear it because inside there was no round
Once Sita felt all time He's around
and so he's sort of cutting out his privacy, her privacy.
So she said now you can be there only for one work
– usually not do every work
He used to have done all the work of Shri Ram
She said that we should choose whichever work
We want him
Then he said I would like to be with Shri Ram
but whenever he sneezes
then i will do this
You see in India when we sneeze
We have to do like this with this because the sneezing is, you see avoids – to avoid all
the negativity.
So we'll go up so if you sneeze or If You feel sleepy and you yawn then also
We do like that, mostly.
So he said whenever He'll yawn you allow Me just to
this we call as chutki I don't know what You called it
Chutki
Allow me To Do This
Sheetha said
This is something very little work
if see these fellow then will be out of sight
so she stood there
and now why are you standing here
I am waiting for That
How can i go
And thats how
First she granted
alright given to your this job
Now she can't take it back because She's granted this job, so He is always there like
This standing just to do this –to stay down.
So I mean the sweetness of whole thing that every time ,every minute he is subservient
.He' attentive and He''s There also in Sahaja Yoga
I have relationships with you as a guru,
As mother and –I don't know- unlimited.
But still these two relationship we all
that am your Mother & am your Guru
Now my…
…as a guru
My main concern is
That
You should learn
All about Sahaja Yoga
And become experts
Of Sahajyoga
and you should become yourself the gurus.
It's only concern I have,
but for that complete surrender is required
Islam means surrender
so You've to surrender
if Your surrendered
then Only we can learn
what Is The
What Is way We'll handle Sahaja Yoga
Now even this surrendering
it done by Shri Hanuman
He is the one who teaches you how to surrender or makes you surrender.
Because egotistical people don't surrender,
then he puts some sort of hurdles
and some sort miracles
by which a disciple surrenders himself
otherwise he's not surrendered
And he finds it difficult to surrender, and the force that acts
To make him surrendered
Is also that of anumana.
So not only is He surrendered
But He makes others also to be surrendered
Because because you cannot surrender
so He's one who fights your ego
And He puts it down and makes you surrender.
So in His own expression I would say that what He has shown,
That there is a very beautiful area of right side
If It Is to be perfectly enjoyed
Then You should become completely surrendered
To Your Guru as if You are the servant
of that guru.
Whatever you have to do for the Guru,
You must know that your guru has
To give you Realization minimum
Otherwise thats not a guru
But anybody who's given you the realization
You've got be so surrendered
That should just like a servant
Not feel shy about it
Like sometimes I'm going by
Say, I am Going By Aeroplane
And sometimes I cannot wear my shoes because they are so swollen up.
So normally, I would take the shoes in My hands and walk about
but have seen Sahaja Yogis –
They pick-up My shoes also
…and don't feel shy about it
It feels proud that
..they're carrying My Shoes
One should be proud
That you've done all these things
You had a chance to do
all these things for your guru and that you are surrendering to
That Guru. You're absolutely only bothered as
how can serve the guru,
How Can Please The Guru
And
how
could be closer
To That Guru
It doesn't mean physical closeness but
a kind of a rapport
A Kind Of An Understanding
Even those who were away from Me
can feel Me in their heart, and this is what it is that
we have to get these powers from Shri Hanumana.
Now He's the one who protects also all the deities
– he protects!
There' s a difference between Shri Ganesha
And Him
The Sri Ganesa gives energy, Shakti
but the One Who protects
Is Shri Hanuman
So you'll find that when Shri Krishna was the chariot of Arjuna, then on top
up the charioteer was sitting Hanumana not Shri Ganesha.
Hanumanas were there looking after him also in a way
That Sri Rama himself becomes Shri Vishnu so he has to look
After Him He is an angel as
You know according to Christian we should say
according to Bible, that He is the angel called Gabriel.
Now Gabriel was one who brought this message because he's always a messenger – to Maria
and surprisingly these words were used as emaculata salve – my first name is Nirmala
means emaculatea so her names are Salve.
He said those words to her and today also I was surprised when it came
To giving me a present, they found tea set
And dinner set which is called as Maria.
So Maria has do quite lot with Hanumana all Her life
That means Maria Is the Mahalakshmi
Mahalakshmi being the Sita, Sita then Radha.
Hanumana has to be there for everyone and that is why
you see sometimes people say Mother how did You know?
Mother How Did You come To Know?
Mother uh..
..how do You send a message?
Mother! How Do You work it out?
Can you imagine this is Shri Hanumanas headache
He does It
If anything passes through my mind, He just takes it up and is done.
Because as I told you that His whole organization is so well planned – all these messages from
where do they get?
Many people say,"Mother!
I'lljust pray to You."
There was a gentleman whose motherwas very sickand he wentto see her and she was just
goingtoday with cancer . Sohe said,"I didn't know what todo ,so i just prayed
to you, Mother. Please save my mother." Now the sincerity of that person – uh…
The depth as a Sahaja Yogi Hanumana knows he know what is weight this person has and
immediately will be surprised within three days woman was going die survived she got
all right brought her Bombay doctor said no cancer many things which we call miracles
are done by Shri Hanuman. He's the one who is a doer of miracles, he does miracles also
to show how stupid you're and foolish because he was on right side – see it goes
towards ego-side now with the ego human being always becomes stupid I mean inevitable
With ego they become so stupid, oh what's wrong?
And that is why you will find many people doing such stupid things we can't understand
why do it.
They say – What' swrong?
What''s wrong is Anumana doesn´t like this point and then it recoils when they
act stupidly it recoils but sometimes it could be extremely, extremely, extremely
It's extremely difficult to retrace back, like the diseases as I call it – the U.P.'s

these people and doesn't work!
He does not relate your conscious mind so you're conscience cannot act just goes
off only this people if they worship Hanuman with same devotion then maybe there might
But it's not an easy thing to convince these stupid you-peas about anything.
They say, we don't believe – so what?
You die! What else?! That is the only life left for
And there are many aspects of Hanumana which I could have told
But for example, uh…for His body you see like Shiva is covered with a geru what we
call.
Geru – that's the kind of thing …you know that geru it'a red colored stone which
very-very hot and supposing ah..with cold sometimes you develop those rashes so if
put geru, those rashes are curled or you get due to badha sometimes some sort of skin diseases
which is cured with geru because it's the one that very hot and it soothes you down.
On contrary Shri Ganesa is covered in lead oxide – red lead oxide–which is extremely
Lead oxide is a very cool thing.
If you touch it, lead, you see the very cool things
so that led-oxide used to cover all his body
Is there...
To balance
The heat
That he has
Or effects of heat
So we call this in Sanskrit language
It's called as Shindura
And also in Marathi it was called Shindoora
So you must find always, this is the color of that thing.
So luckily I got these saree in Vienna
and have it very nice for this occasion
so he's also covered with that colour
what we call as Sindoor Colour
And lead oxide though they say causes cancer
people said that lead oxide can cause your cancer
But it is the lead oxide which can cool you down so much that
You go to your left side and cancer
Is a psychosomatic disease
And this might be why in very far-fetched way
We say, it could cause cancer
Because if It's too cold
Then
You go To Your Left Side
On The Left Side
You Can Catch The Viruses
By Which You Can Get Into Troubles
So, but the same lead oxide is all right for people who are very rightsided.
For them if it's put on their Agnya they're cooled down and its' good to put on their
Agnya so that there cool-downs – anger goes out, temper goes up… and this a very
our speediness, our aggressiveness – He's the one who does it.
Now he played a trick on Hitler how Hitler was using Shri Ganesha as an symbol so this swastika
was made in a clockwise manner.
Then Hanumana played the trick on him, what he did?
He made the stencil which they were using for making the swastika – he put it some
or other lot of … I mean…
that they said we should use the other side.
As soon as, they used to others' sides,
it's all monastic.
I suggested him but he played a trick
They started using Ganesha from another side
The same Ganesa about whom
Shri Hanuman was worried how will He
How can He surpass Shri Ganesh?
Because is the eldest and now you go beyond Him
and he's the deity, but Hanumana is an angel.
So as soon a trick was played then both of them put together
stopped Hitler from winning – this how the trick was played
so all these little-little tricks you see are there
Once I remember had my puja in Germany
And Germany is the place where these tricks are played very much by Hanumana, because I
told you that they're ones who require Him most.
So there was a Germany and then Pooja – in the puja by mistake They put it another
way round…by mistake!
I didn't see – normally, I always watch very carefully but I don´t know why that
day.
It must be also Hanuman Astric and when saw it said oh God where is going to now hurt?
Where will this work out which country its gonna hit ? It did not hit Germany ,it hit
England because in England have worked so hard there they are been so negligent
about Sahaja Yoga, so lethargic about it that he just went and hid there.
So He's the one who goes like a torrential rain or can go like very speedy tempest
And destroy things
So, he works out all these things through his electromagnetic forces.
All the matter is under His control and He's
Who creates rain for you, who creates suns for you.
He create breeze for your he's the one
that does all these things just to have a proper Pooja
To Have A Proper Meeting
Everything here works out so beautifully
and nobody even knows
That it is Shri Hanumana who has done
And we should thank Shri hanumanah all the time
For today thing I mean there are
If i talk about him
I'll take hours together, but only thing
have to say that it's a such a blessing
i feel
That we had this in this palace
Shri Hanumanas Pujya
Because he was always
A very
Majestic
Deity or Angel
And
That, in a place where it is so majestic and beautifully done everything
Is there. And he would like that
He's not a sanyasi type of person
Not an ascetic
Normally right sided people are ascetic
They become bow house they'll make
Right sided people
We will have every thing simple
They'd love to shave off their nose also if possible on the faces
So, you see the other way round Hanumana is not right.
Hanuman likes beauty he like decorativeness and makes people non-ascetic so hanumana gives
You this kind of thing but many peoples who are worshippers of hanumana always say

is the one who doesn't want women to see him
because he does not wear full clothes
and has very little clothes on himself
so, He don'st'want for men too.
But if a woman thinks that it just child
then its same
but this idea I think people dont have
That He Is A Child
What It For A Child?
How Many Clothes He Wear or Doesn't Matter
And Then He Is A Monkey
The Monkeys Are Not Supposed To Wear Clothes
So, whatever he wears is quite a lot and it doesn't give you even the feeling at all

But You just see such as sweet form of Him –
Such As Sweet Form!
I wish sometimes
…you get His photograph also
—as we have got
The photographs
Of Shri Ganesha
Then will really fall in love with this
Such A Sweet Thing
And though He so huge
and so big. And though he has nails, but when He caresses My feet
–he pulls back His nails–He is so gentle!
It's extremely gentle
…and very beautifully He caresses my feet
I have seen Him the way
He handles everything in extremely gentle ways
So that what i feel now Germans are becoming very gentle
In handling things…in handling people
This change is coming and I think it's the blessing of Hanumanah on them.
